channel.title: ApiDelta — LLM API changelog digest
channel.description: Daily digest of changes across LLM APIs (Anthropic, OpenAI, Mistral, etc.).

item.title: ApiDelta — May 13, 2026
item.description: Today's updates focus on new tool‑search capabilities, agent executor changes, a fast‑mode pricing tier for Claude Opus, and several library enhancements. Pydantic‑AI 1.95.0 introd...

item.title: ApiDelta — May 12, 2026
item.description: Takeaway — Update `anthropic` to v0.101.0 for native AWS auth on Claude Platform; OpenAI resolved GPT-5.5 error spike across Chat Completions and Responses. Anthropic's Python SDK ...

item.title: ApiDelta — May 11, 2026
item.description: Takeaway — Anthropic launches Claude API on AWS with native IAM auth; Mistral SDK v2.4.5 ships breaking changes in workflow response shapes. Three items today: Claude Platform goes...

item.title: ApiDelta — May 10, 2026
item.description: Mistral added a new model endpoint, Claude services recovered from several brief outages, and OpenAI reported resolved performance hiccups for Codex and the Responses API. Mistral ...

item.title: ApiDelta — May 8, 2026
item.description: Several LLM providers rolled out updates and resolved incidents, notably a new Mistral model and multiple Claude‑related error spikes. Mistral released the Small 3.2 model (model I...

item.title: ApiDelta — May 7, 2026
item.description: Anthropic expanded 1 M‑token context windows to GA models and added a rate‑limits endpoint, while several older Claude models are now retired; Mistral released Vibe 2.0 and updated...
